name: Polish Cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sliced cucumbers with the basil, dill weed, parsley, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Drizzle the oil and wine vinegar over the mixture.
3. Stir gently until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish or jar.
5. Cover tightly and refrigerate until ready to serve.
